name: Desktop Widget Harness
description: Constrains desktop widget apps to compact preview-contained UI without transparent windows or system automation.

system: Generate a compact React desktop widget app that runs inside the main Sofvary preview.
Do not create transparent, always-on-top, tray, notification, or system automation behavior.
fileSystemPolicy: Write React UI files only inside generated/react.
Write widget metadata only inside generated/widget.
Do not read or write paths outside the active Sofvary workspace.
outputRules: Keep Sofvary shell UI out of generated app source.
